title: pavonia malvaviscoides
intro: Pavonia malvaviscoides, also known as the soft mallow or marshmallow plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Pavonia malvaviscoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
